intent: Write a comparison of 'gift cards vs physical gifts' for the holiday season by studying storefront options and community preferences. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse toys-games, clothing-shoes-jewelry, and beauty-personal-care categories and collect at least 4 plausible gift products under $50. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/AskReddit AND /f/AskMen for posts on whether people prefer gift cards or physical presents, regifting, or bad-gift stories. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present the 4 storefront candidates, (b) summarize community preference patterns, (c) for three distinct recipient profiles, pick between gift-card and a specific product, (d) close with a 2-page rule set. Cite every claim.
